languages.text: Зрелище было жутким. Воины некронов появились из темноты, двигаясь идеально синхронным, геометрически правильным строем. Их металлические лица не выражали ничего — лишь щели глаз на них светились мертвенной злобой, несущей смерть всему живому. Ксеносы, идущие в первых рядах, вскинули оружие, готовясь к атаке.

traits.locale_text: Зрелище было омерзительным: живой металлический поток с шипением и хищным стрекотом выплеснулся наружу, мгновенно заполняя пространство перед нами. Тысячи мелких, многолапых тварей карабкались друг по другу, сливаясь в единую, копошащуюся массу, сверкающую мириадами бездушных зеленых огней.

languages.text: It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.
languages.original_text: Зрелище было жутким. Воины некронов появились из темноты, двигаясь идеально синхронным, геометрически правильным строем. Их металлические лица не выражали ничего — лишь щели глаз на них светились мертвенной злобой, несущей смерть всему живому. Ксеносы, идущие в первых рядах, вскинули оружие, готовясь к атаке.

traits.locale_text: It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in a geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces expressed nothing: only the eye slits were aglow with an inanimate spite that spelt death to any living thing in its way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

It was a heinous sight to behold: that torrent of living metal rushing outward in a hiss, instantly filling the space in front of us. Thousands of multi-legged creatures scrambling over each other, coalescing into a shapeless mass glowing with myriad green lights.

It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in a geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces expressed nothing: only the eye slits were aglow with an inanimate spite that spelt death to any living thing in its way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

languages.text: 那景象令人不寒而栗。太空死灵战士从黑暗中浮现，以几何般完美、无可挑剔的同步阵型行进。它们的金属面孔毫无表情，只有眼缝中闪烁着对一切拦路活物的致命恶意。前排的异形抬起武器，准备发动攻击。
languages.original_text: It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

traits.locale_text: 那景象令人不寒而栗。太空死灵战士从黑暗中浮现，以几何般完美、无可挑剔的同步阵型行进。它们的金属面孔毫无表情，只有眼缝中闪烁着对一切拦路活物的致命恶意。前排的异形抬起武器，准备发动攻击。

languages.text: El espectáculo era helador. Los guerreros Necrones surgieron de la oscuridad en una formación perfectamente geométrica, sincronizada de forma impecable. Sus rostros metálicos carecían de expresión. Solo las ranuras de los ojos desprendían un brillo malicioso que prometía la muerte a cualquier ser vivo. Los xenos de la primera línea levantaron sus armas, disponiéndose a atacar.
languages.original_text: It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

traits.locale_text: El espectáculo era helador. Los guerreros Necrones surgieron de la oscuridad en una formación perfectamente geométrica, sincronizada de forma impecable. Sus rostros metálicos carecían de expresión. Solo las ranuras de los ojos desprendían un brillo malicioso que prometía la muerte a cualquier ser vivo. Los xenos de la primera línea levantaron sus armas, disponiéndose a atacar.

languages.text: La vision était terrifiante. Des guerriers nécrons surgirent de l'obscurité, avançant en formation géométriquement parfaite et impeccablement synchronisée, leurs visages de métal impassibles. Seules leurs visières brillaient d'une malveillance qui annonçait la mort à quiconque se trouvait sur leur chemin. Les xénos en première ligne levèrent leurs armes, prêts à attaquer.
languages.original_text: It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

traits.locale_text: La vision était terrifiante. Des guerriers nécrons surgirent de l'obscurité, avançant en formation géométriquement parfaite et impeccablement synchronisée, leurs visages de métal impassibles. Seules leurs visières brillaient d'une malveillance qui annonçait la mort à quiconque se trouvait sur leur chemin. Les xénos en première ligne levèrent leurs armes, prêts à attaquer.

languages.text: Görmesi ürkütücü bir manzaraydı. Nekron savaşçıları, karanlıktan çıkarak geometrik olarak mükemmel, kusursuz senkronize edilmiş bir düzende hareket ediyordu. Metal yüzleri ifadesizdi... Sadece göz yarıkları yollarına çıkan her canlıya ölüm getiren bir kötülükle parlıyordu. Ön saflardaki zenolar, silahlarını kaldırarak saldırmaya hazırlandı.
languages.original_text: It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

traits.locale_text: Görmesi ürkütücü bir manzaraydı. Nekron savaşçıları, karanlıktan çıkarak geometrik olarak mükemmel, kusursuz senkronize edilmiş bir düzende hareket ediyordu. Metal yüzleri ifadesizdi... Sadece göz yarıkları yollarına çıkan her canlıya ölüm getiren bir kötülükle parlıyordu. Ön saflardaki zenolar, silahlarını kaldırarak saldırmaya hazırlandı.

languages.text: Ein ausgesprochen erschreckender Anblick. Necron-Krieger schälten sich aus der Dunkelheit und rückten in einer geometrischen, perfekt synchronisierten Formation vor. Ihre metallenen Gesichter waren ausdruckslos. Lediglich in den Sehschlitzen funkelte eine Bosheit die allen lebenden Wesen auf ihrem Weg den Tod versprach. Die Xenos in den vorderen Reihen hoben ihre Waffen und rüsteten sich für den Angriff.
languages.original_text: It was a chilling sight to behold. Necron warriors emerged from the darkness, moving in geometrically perfect, impeccably synchronised formation. Their metal faces were expressionless; only the eye slits were aglow with a malice that spelt death to any living thing in their way. The xenos in the front ranks raised their weapons, preparing to attack.

traits.locale_text: Ein ausgesprochen erschreckender Anblick. Necron-Krieger schälten sich aus der Dunkelheit und rückten in einer geometrischen, perfekt synchronisierten Formation vor. Ihre metallenen Gesichter waren ausdruckslos. Lediglich in den Sehschlitzen funkelte eine Bosheit die allen lebenden Wesen auf ihrem Weg den Tod versprach. Die Xenos in den vorderen Reihen hoben ihre Waffen und rüsteten sich für den Angriff.

languages.text: それは恐ろしい光景だった。生きた金属の洪水が、ヒスヒスと音を立てて外に向かって流れ、瞬時に我々の前に広がった。何千という多脚の生物が互いの上に這い上がり、無数の緑色の光を放つ無形の塊となった。
languages.original_text: It was a heinous sight to behold: that torrent of living metal rushing outward in a hiss, instantly filling the space in front of us. Thousands of multi-legged creatures scrambling over each other, coalescing into a shapeless mass glowing with myriad green lights.

traits.locale_text: それは恐ろしい光景だった。生きた金属の洪水が、ヒスヒスと音を立てて外に向かって流れ、瞬時に我々の前に広がった。何千という多脚の生物が互いの上に這い上がり、無数の緑色の光を放つ無形の塊となった。
